steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content: The line contains $(-2,3)$ and $(4,-5)$. Its slope is $$m=\frac{-5-3}{4-(-2)}=\frac{-8}{6}=-\frac{4}{3}.$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The function is $$f(x)=-\frac{4}{3}x+\frac{1}{3}.$$ This matches choice C.

steps.title: Use the fastest choice check
steps.content: Only choice C has slope $-\frac{4}{3}$, so once the slope is found, the other choices are eliminated immediately. The intercept calculation confirms that choice C also passes through the given points.
